description: Hotels and residential buildings — near-continuous occupancy with twin peaks.

behavioral_rules.name: Morning and Evening Occupancy Peaks
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Pre-heat hot water 30 min before peak to avoid instant-draw spikes.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Twin residential peaks detected — morning and evening usage spikes.

behavioral_rules.name: High Night-Time Base Load
behavioral_rules.description: Average consumption between 11PM-5AM exceeds threshold % of daily mean.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Investigate equipment left running overnight. Schedule HVAC setback.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Building is consuming {value}% of daytime energy overnight.

efficiency_rules.name: Demand Spike Detection
efficiency_rules.description: Max meter reading exceeds threshold × mean — indicates uncontrolled demand peaks.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Peak demand is {value:.1f}x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.

efficiency_rules.name: Hot Water / Steam Proportion
efficiency_rules.description: Hot water should be 20-35% of energy in lodging — spikes indicate inefficiency.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: Install heat pump water heaters — 3x more efficient than electric.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Hot water load at {value:.0%} — above 35% benchmark for lodging sector.

weather_sensitivity_rules.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
weather_sensitivity_rules.description: Correlation between air_temperature and meter_reading reveals cooling/heating dependency.
weather_sensitivity_rules.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.
weather_sensitivity_rules.demo_alert: Energy use is {value:.0%} correlated with outdoor temperature.

weather_sensitivity_rules.name: Seasonal Energy Pattern
weather_sensitivity_rules.description: Summer (Jun-Aug) vs Winter (Dec-Feb) consumption ratio identifies cooling vs heating dominance.
weather_sensitivity_rules.recommendation: Seasonal HVAC tuning can yield 10-20% energy savings.
weather_sensitivity_rules.demo_alert: Summer usage is {value:.0%} higher than winter — cooling-dominated building.

alert_rules.name: Energy Waste During Low Occupancy
alert_rules.description: Weekend patterns show significant waste during low-occupancy floors.
alert_rules.recommendation: Smart floor management — power down unoccupied floors automatically.
alert_rules.demo_alert: Weekend occupancy drop not reflected in energy savings — review floor shutdowns.
